THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILLENTINE, TERRY CADUTO, ANGELO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 173 CLARA STREET, GROUND FLOOR, LEASE FORFEITED, UPON DEFTS. PHYSICALLY VACATING THE PREMISES; PLTF. SHALL DELIVER TO DEFTS. 2 SEPARATE CASHIERS CHECKS IN THE AMOUNT OF $600.00 EACH; THESE CHECKS REPRESENT THE RETURN OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT TO DEFTS; (SEE JUDGMENT FOR MORE DETAIL).
